goal: Validate a bounded multi-agent coding workflow on a small but real bug-fix task with tests, while keeping the task generic and measurable.
strategy: Split the work into bounded requirement verification, backend repair, and result synthesis so one worker never needs the full repository context.

jobs.title: Verify amount-normalization requirements
jobs.instruction: Research and verify the expected normalization rules and the current failing edge cases from the selected files.
jobs.success_check: The rules and failing edge cases are grounded in the selected files.

jobs.title: Implement signed amount normalization fix
jobs.instruction: Fix the normalization bug so parenthesized negative amounts and whitespace-heavy negative amounts are handled correctly, then run the assigned unit tests.
jobs.success_check: The selected tests pass and the implementation remains bounded to the assigned files.

jobs.title: Synthesize bounded implementation outcome
jobs.instruction: Synthesize a concise implementation outcome from the verified rules and the code change result without drifting outside the selected files.
jobs.success_check: The implementation summary stays grounded in the selected files and test result.
